jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
